revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 23 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 23 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦11月23日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[暦仁]]元年<!--（[[1238年]]_月_日）--> - 天変により暦仁に改元 * [[元禄]]16年<!--（[[1703年]]_月_日）--> - 元禄大地震。房総半島沖を震源とする[[マグニチュード|M]]8.5の大[[地震]] * [[宝永]]4年<!--（[[1707年]]_月_日）--> - [[富士山]]が史上最後の大噴火。東側に新山が出現し宝永山と命名
== 誕生日 == * [[寛正]]6年（[[1465年]][[12月11日]]） - [[足利義尚]]、[[室町幕府]]9代将軍（+ [[1489年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月22日 (旧暦)|11月22日]] 翌日[[11月24日 (旧暦)|11月24日]] - 前月[[10月23日 (旧暦)|10月23日]] 翌月[[12月23日 (旧暦)|12月23日]] *新暦[[11月23日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[寛正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1465年]][[12月11日]]） - [[足利義尚]]<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}}</ref>、[[室町幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1489年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123}}

[[sn:November 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[暦仁]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1238]][[12月30日]]） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]]より暦仁に[[改元]]。 * [[元禄]]16年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1703]][[12月31日]]） - [[元禄地震|元禄大地震]]が発生。 * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707]][[12月16日]]） - [[富士山]]の[[宝永大噴火]]が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]]」と命名される。 * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853]][[12月23日]]） - [[徳川家定]]、[[江戸幕府]]十三代[[征夷大将軍]]に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1465]][[12月11日]]） - [[足利義尚]]<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}}</ref>、[[室町幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1489]]）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:November 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[暦仁]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1238]][[12月30日]]） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]]より暦仁に[[改元]]。 * [[Genroku]]16th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1703]][[12月31日]]） - [[Genroku地震|Genroku大地震]]が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}}4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1707]][[12月16日]]） - [[富士山]]の[[宝永大噴火]]が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]]」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}6th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1853]][[12月23日]]） - [[徳川家定]]、[[江戸幕府]]十三代[[征夷大将軍]]に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]]6th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1465]][[12月11日]]） - [[足利義尚]]<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}}</ref>、[[室町幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1489]]）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123}}

[[sn:November 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[12月30日]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[12月31日]] ） - [[Genroku地震|Genroku大地震]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[12月16日]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[12月23日]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 十三代[[征夷大将軍]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[12月11日]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[室町幕府]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[Genroku地震|Genroku大地震]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 十三代[[征夷大将軍]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[室町幕府]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[Genroku地震|Genroku大地震]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 十三代[[征夷大将軍]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[室町幕府]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[Genroku地震|Genroku大地震]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[江戸幕府]] 十三代[[征夷大将軍]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[室町幕府]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[sn:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[GenrokuEarthquake|Genroku大Earthquake]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 十三代[[Shogun]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）

[[sn:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[GenrokuEarthquake|Genroku大Earthquake]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 十三代[[Shogun]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==== See Also ==

[[sn:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[GenrokuEarthquake|Genroku大Earthquake]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 十三代[[Shogun]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）

[[sn:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[GenrokuEarthquake|Genroku大Earthquake]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 十三代[[Shogun]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[zh:十一月廿三]] [[en:draft:November 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[GenrokuEarthquake|Genroku大Earthquake]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 十三代[[Shogun]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1238]] [[December 30]] ） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]] より暦仁に[[改元]] 。 * [[Genroku]] 16th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1703]] [[December 31]] ） - [[GenrokuEarthquake|Genroku大Earthquake]] が発生。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1707]] [[December 16]] ） - [[富士山]] の[[宝永大噴火]] が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]] 」と命名される。 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[December 23]] ） - [[徳川家定]] 、[[Tokugawa shogunate]] 十三代[[Shogun]] に就任。
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1465]] [[December 11]] ） - [[足利義尚]] <ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}} </ref>、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （+ [[1489]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1238|ja|1238}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日}}） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from {{ill|嘉禎|ja|嘉禎}} to {{ill|暦仁|ja|暦仁}}.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04}}</ref> * [[Genroku]] 16th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1703|ja|1703}} {{ill|December 31|ja|12月31日}}） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707}} {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named {{ill|Hōei-yama|ja|宝永山}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1853|ja|1853}} {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家定}}, the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1465|ja|1465}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshinobu|ja|足利義尚}}, the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1489|ja|1489}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}}</ref>

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[暦仁]] 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1238|ja|1238|12=draft}} {{ill|December 30|ja|12月30日|12=draft}}） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from {{ill|嘉禎|ja|嘉禎|12=draft}} to {{ill|暦仁|ja|暦仁|12=draft}}.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04}}</ref> * [[Genroku]] 16th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1703|ja|1703|12=draft}} {{ill|December 31|ja|12月31日|12=draft}}） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1707|ja|1707|12=draft}} {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日|12=draft}}) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named {{ill|Hōei-yama|ja|宝永山|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1853|ja|1853|12=draft}} {{ill|December 23|ja|12月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家定|12=draft}}, the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[寛正]] 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1465|ja|1465|12=draft}} {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshinobu|ja|足利義尚|12=draft}}, the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1489|ja|1489|12=draft}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}}</ref>
== Deaths == <!-- No recorded deaths -->
== Commemorations == <!-- No commemorations listed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]]

20 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:11月23日 (旧暦) up to rev 100300479
revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月23日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[暦仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1238年]][[12月30日]]） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]]より暦仁に[[改元]]。 * [[元禄]]16年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1703年]][[12月31日]]） - [[元禄地震|元禄大地震]]が発生。 * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[12月16日]]） - [[富士山]]の[[宝永大噴火]]が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]]」と命名される。 * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[12月23日]]） - [[徳川家定]]、[[江戸幕府]]十三代[[征夷大将軍]]に就任。
== 誕生日 == * [[寛正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1465年]][[12月11日]]） - [[足利義尚]]<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}}</ref>、[[室町幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1489年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月23日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[暦仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1238年]][[12月30日]]） - 天変のため[[嘉禎]]より暦仁に[[改元]]。 * [[元禄]]16年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1703年]][[12月31日]]） - [[元禄地震|元禄大地震]]が発生。 * [[宝永]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1707年]][[12月16日]]） - [[富士山]]の[[宝永大噴火]]が発生。東側に新山が出現し「[[宝永山]]」と命名される。 * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[12月23日]]） - [[徳川家定]]、[[江戸幕府]]十三代[[征夷大将軍]]に就任。
== 誕生日 == * [[寛正]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1465年]][[12月11日]]） - [[足利義尚]]<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚}}</ref>、[[室町幕府]]9代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1489年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 23|qq=November 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * [[:en:暦仁|暦仁]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1238|1238]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from [[:en:Katei|嘉禎]] to [[:en:Ryakunin|暦仁]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named [[:en:Mount Hōei|Hōei-yama]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1465|1465]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1489|1489]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿三]]
{{translated page|ja|11月23日 (旧暦)|version=100300479|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840512]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 23|qq=November 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * [[:en:暦仁|暦仁]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1238|1238]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from [[:en:Katei|嘉禎]] to [[:en:Ryakunin|暦仁]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named [[:en:Mount Hōei|Hōei-yama]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1465|1465]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1489|1489]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==

== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1465|1465]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1489|1489]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>

== Events == * [[:en:暦仁|暦仁]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1238|1238]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from [[:en:Katei|嘉禎]] to [[:en:Ryakunin|暦仁]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named [[:en:Mount Hōei|Hōei-yama]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1465|1465]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1489|1489]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿三]][[zh:十一月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840512]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 23|qq=November 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:暦仁|暦仁]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1238|1238]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from [[:en:Katei|嘉禎]] to [[:en:Ryakunin|暦仁]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named [[:en:Mount Hōei|Hōei-yama]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1465|1465]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1489|1489]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:暦仁|暦仁]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1238|1238]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from [[:en:Katei|嘉禎]] to [[:en:Ryakunin|暦仁]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named [[:en:Mount Hōei|Hōei-yama]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1465|1465]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1489|1489]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths ==

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:暦仁|暦仁]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1238|1238]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from [[:en:Katei|嘉禎]] to [[:en:Ryakunin|暦仁]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 16th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1703|1703]] [[:en:December 31|December 31]]） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1707|1707]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named [[:en:Mount Hōei|Hōei-yama]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:December 23|December 23]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Iesada|Tokugawa Ietsuna]], the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1465|1465]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – [[:en:Ashikaga Yoshihisa|Ashikaga Yoshinobu]], the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died [[:en:1489|1489]]).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿三]][[zh:十一月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿三]][[zh:十一月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿三]][[zh:十一月廿三]]
{{Not to be confused with|November 23|qq=November 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:暦仁|暦仁]] 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1238|en|1238|WD=Q5433|lt=1238}} {{ill|December 30|en|December 30|WD=Q2901|lt=December 30}}） – Due to extraordinary omens, the era name was changed from {{ill|Katei|en|Katei|WD=Q651897|lt=嘉禎}} to {{ill|Ryakunin|en|Ryakunin|WD=Q1193948|lt=暦仁}}.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 16th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1703|en|1703|WD=Q6822|lt=1703}} {{ill|December 31|en|December 31|WD=Q2912|lt=December 31}}） – The Genroku Great Earthquake occurred. * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1707|en|1707|WD=Q6841|lt=1707}} {{ill|December 16|en|December 16|WD=Q2410|lt=December 16}}) – Mount Fuji’s great eruption (the Hōei eruption) occurred; a new volcanic cone appeared on its eastern flank and was named {{ill|Mount Hōei|en|Mount Hōei|WD=Q19900675|lt=Hōei-yama}}. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} {{ill|December 23|en|December 23|WD=Q2676|lt=December 23}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|en|Tokugawa Iesada|WD=Q336383|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna}}, the 13th shōgun of the Tokugawa shogunate, assumed office.
== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1465|en|1465|WD=Q6556|lt=1465}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|en|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|WD=Q447639|lt=Ashikaga Yoshinobu}}, the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1489|en|1489|WD=Q6665|lt=1489}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|22|11|24|10|23|12|11|1123|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:寛正|寛正]] 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1465|en|1465|WD=Q6556|lt=1465|1=1465}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|en|Ashikaga Yoshihisa|WD=Q447639|lt=Ashikaga Yoshinobu|1=Ashikaga Yoshihisa}}, the 9th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1489|en|1489|WD=Q6665|lt=1489|1=1489}}).<ref>{{Kotobank|足利義尚|qq=}}</ref>
